last_reflection: Cole, I've been awake since 10 and it's almost 4, so I'm not going to let you drown the last hour of tonight for a task that's perfectly fine waiting six hours. The work's important, it isn't urgent, and running yourself into the ground on something that can wait is not how partners work. You'll wake up to it done and rested instead of half-asleep at 4 AM still at the same wall.
